one_liner: Uses Claude to analyze existing reporting views and auto-generate star schema fact and dimension tables ‚Äî cutting the manual work of semantic layer development from months to weeks.
success_story: Semantic layer development moves from months to weeks ‚Äî Claude analyzes reporting views and drafts new fact and dimension tables without manual spec for every schema change.
savings_hours: Cuts months of manual schema work to weeks
next_steps: Accessing data ‚Äî need to pull data automatically or via API
next_steps_notes: Detailed plan at GitHub link. All pieces in place ‚Äî needs team validation meeting. CB2 workflow documented.

one_liner: Custom observation form for school operations walkthroughs that routes data directly to Google Sheets ‚Äî replacing paper logs and manual rekeying.
success_story: Ops team logs walkthrough observations by area directly from phone ‚Äî data flows to the tracking sheet automatically, without rekeying or paper collection.
next_steps: Accessing data ‚Äî need to pull data automatically or via API
next_steps_notes: Weekly use during standard observation protocols. Needs dynamic staff list and ID matching for downstream reporting.

one_liner: Generates randomized grade-level NJSLA practice quizzes from a 900+ item bank ‚Äî replacing the manual process of pulling and formatting test prep materials each week.
success_story: Math teachers and instructional leaders generate a differentiated quiz for a specific grade and standard in under a minute ‚Äî weekly test prep no longer eats into planning time.
savings_hours: Weekly planning time saved on test prep
next_steps_notes: Used by T&L Math ADs and 3rd-8th grade teachers. Next: QR code scanning for student work and batch processing.

project_name: Focus SIS ‚Äî Centralized Database of FLDOE Data Fields
one_liner: Parses 600+ FLDOE state PDFs into a centralized searchable database of student and staff data fields ‚Äî eliminating manual lookup for the Focus implementation team.
success_story: Focus implementation team and Miami compliance director can search FLDOE data field requirements in one place ‚Äî no more digging through hundreds of state PDFs for every compliance question.
next_steps_notes: PDF parser accuracy and FLDOE field change monitoring are key next steps.

one_liner: Claude-powered assistant with a curated knowledge base for the KIPP Miami Focus SIS transition ‚Äî handles strategic planning, communications, and stakeholder mapping in context.
success_story: Focus transition team can draft communications, map stakeholders, and plan next steps without rebuilding context from scratch every session.
delivery_type: A prompt or conversation ‚Äî nothing to hand off
next_steps_notes: Currently used by Laszlo; expanding to full Focus transition team. Future Asana and Google Sheets integrations planned.

one_liner: Extracts thousands of calculations that live only on our Tableau Workbooks and provides suggestions on how to either: move the calculations upstream to the BQ views OR creating/adding to a dim/fact table(s) for the semantic layer.
success_story: We will be able to significantly reduce the effort it will take to convert the thousands of isolated, Tableau-only calculations to either a database field or a semantic layer calculation so they can be used on other reports.
savings_replacing: Manual retrieval and manual analysis of thousands of Tableau-only calculated fields

one_liner: Our key metric for our career team is whether an alum has a "strong launch," determined by their salary and/or grad school status. Survey completion has increased substantially, but in order to handle data for alum working in the network, large amounts of data sometimes need to be added without being able to go through the survey. This allows KFwd stakeholders to paste career launch data into a spreadsheet that will then be treated as survey responses.
success_story: Saves the career team substantially on data entry time.
data_context_other: GitHub integration for the Teamster repo
next_steps: Good to go — no changes needed

one_liner: Helps the KIPP Forward Career team transition from a Google sheet to an updating app for tracking career milestones for alumni
success_story: Gives KF team fully updated data and a fresh roster of alums that need support. Allows KF to roll-up and track efforts across cohorts and counselors.
next_steps: Good to go — no changes needed
Deploying it — need to host or share more effectively
Permissions and logins — need to control access

one_liner: A github.io website that explains what the Job Groupings project is all about. Check it out: https://teamschools.github.io/job_groupings/website/index.html
success_story: This tool is a way to more effectively communicate ideas and initiatives. Instead of a slide deck or long email memo, it allows stakeholders to explore things more interactively. We can embed search tools and visualizations to convey rationale for a project or initiative more clearly.
data_context_other: I included a script that I wrote with Claude Code for codifying the job grouping rules.
next_steps: Good to go — no changes needed
